title: Section 20
content: The account books of a registered Trade Union and the list of members thereof shall be open to inspection by an 1[office-bearer] or member of the Trade Union at such times as may be provided for in the rules of the Trade Union.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 1964, s. 2, for "officer" (w.e.f. 1-4-1965).
